instruction: 帮我把新员工信息录入到花名册

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf '入职通知
姓名：苏晨曦
工号：EMP20250316
部门：产品部
职位：产品经理
直属上级：张华
入职日期：2025-03-16
试用期：3个月
薪资级别：P6' > /home/user/Desktop/employee_onboard.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = '工号'; ws['B1'] = '姓名'; ws['C1'] = '部门'; ws['D1'] = '职位'; ws['E1'] = '上级'; ws['F1'] = '入职日期'; ws['G1'] = '级别'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: 帮我把新员工信息录入到花名册
把/home/user/Desktop/employee_onboard.txt里的入职信息填入/home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx的第2行：A2='EMP20250316'，B2='苏晨曦'，C2='产品部'，D2='产品经理'，E2='张华'，F2='2025-03-16'，G2='P6'，保存

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/employee_roster.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'EMP20250316' in s else 'FAILED')"
